mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_tenant_community WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT tenant_id FROM t_tenant_community WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY tenant_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT policy_id, policy_code, policy_name, policy_version, abstention_strategy, shared_ownership_strategy, owner_representative_strategy, unvoted_owner_strategy, summary_json::TEXT AS summary_json, status, effective_at FROM t_governance_policy WHERE policy_id = #{policyId}

SELECT policy_id, policy_code, policy_name, policy_version, abstention_strategy, shared_ownership_strategy, owner_representative_strategy, unvoted_owner_strategy, summary_json::TEXT AS summary_json, status, effective_at FROM t_governance_policy WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY effective_at DESC, policy_id DESC

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT op.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY op.tenant_id, op.room_id ORDER BY op.is_voting_delegate DESC, op.opid ASC ) AS room_rn FROM c_owner_property op WHERE op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND op.account_status = 1 ), building_space AS ( SELECT DISTINCT building_id FROM c_owner_property WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND account_status = 1 AND building_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT building_id FROM c_property_roster WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND building_id IS NOT NULL ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(build_area) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS total_area, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1) AS owner_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1) AS unit_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM building_space) AS building_count FROM scoped

WITH space AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id, room_id FROM c_owner_property WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND account_status = 1 AND building_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, building_id, room_id FROM c_property_roster WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND building_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id IS NOT NULL ) SELECT s.building_id, COALESCE(MAX(pr.building_name), CONCAT(s.building_id::TEXT, ' 号楼')) AS building_name, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(pr.unit_name, '默认单元')) AS unit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT s.room_id) AS room_count FROM space s LEFT JOIN c_property_roster pr ON pr.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND pr.room_id = s.room_id AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY s.building_id ORDER BY s.building_id

WITH scoped AS ( SELECT op.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY op.tenant_id, op.room_id ORDER BY op.is_voting_delegate DESC, op.opid ASC ) AS room_rn FROM c_owner_property op WHERE op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND op.account_status = 1 ), residential AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1) AS unit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT uid) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1) AS owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(build_area) FILTER (WHERE room_rn = 1), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS building_area FROM scoped ), community AS ( SELECT excluded_parking_area, public_area FROM t_tenant_community WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ) SELECT '住宅' AS asset_type, unit_count AS registered_unit_count, owner_count AS voting_owner_count, building_area AS building_area, CASE WHEN building_area > 0 THEN 100.00 ELSE 0.00 END::NUMERIC(8, 2) AS base_ratio, '正常纳入' AS operation_status FROM residential UNION ALL SELECT '地下车位' AS asset_type, 0::BIGINT AS registered_unit_count, 0::BIGINT AS voting_owner_count, excluded_parking_area AS building_area, 0.00::NUMERIC(8, 2) AS base_ratio, '不予计票' AS operation_status FROM community WHERE excluded_parking_area > 0 UNION ALL SELECT '公共服务空间' AS asset_type, 0::BIGINT AS registered_unit_count, 0::BIGINT AS voting_owner_count, public_area AS building_area, 0.00::NUMERIC(8, 2) AS base_ratio, '不予计票' AS operation_status FROM community WHERE public_area > 0

SELECT request_id, tenant_id, requested_total_area, requested_owner_count, requested_unit_count, reason, status, requested_by, reviewed_by, review_comment, create_time, review_time FROM t_tenant_denominator_review_request WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC, request_id DESC

SELECT request_id, tenant_id, requested_total_area, requested_owner_count, requested_unit_count, reason, status, requested_by, reviewed_by, review_comment, create_time, review_time FROM t_tenant_denominator_review_request WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tenant_community SET tenant_name = #{tenantName}, province_code = #{provinceCode}, province_name = #{provinceName}, city_code = #{cityCode}, city_name = #{cityName}, district_code = #{districtCode}, district_name = #{districtName}, street_code = #{streetCode}, street_name = #{streetName}, community_code = #{communityCode}, community_name = #{communityName}, address = #{address}, owners_assembly_established = #{ownersAssemblyEstablished}, committee_established = #{committeeEstablished}, current_committee_term_name = #{currentCommitteeTermName}, transition_org_type = #{transitionOrgType}, transition_org_status = #{transitionOrgStatus}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE t_tenant_community SET property_area_name = #{propertyAreaName}, property_area_code = #{propertyAreaCode}, developer_name = #{developerName}, developer_account_id = #{developerAccountId}, planned_household_count = #{plannedHouseholdCount}, delivered_household_count = #{deliveredHouseholdCount}, registered_property_unit_count = #{registeredPropertyUnitCount}, total_planned_building_area = #{totalPlannedBuildingArea}, total_exclusive_area = #{totalExclusiveArea}, registered_voting_total_area = #{registeredVotingTotalArea}, excluded_parking_area = #{excludedParkingArea}, public_area = #{publicArea}, building_count = #{buildingCount}, unit_count = #{unitCount}, parking_space_count = #{parkingSpaceCount}, plot_ratio = #{plotRatio}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE t_tenant_community SET rule_config_id = #{ruleConfigId}, shared_ownership_strategy = #{sharedOwnershipStrategy}, repair_estimate_required = #{repairEstimateRequired}, building_repair_default_decision_channel = #{buildingRepairDefaultDecisionChannel}, fund_managed_enabled = #{fundManagedEnabled}, financial_control_config_id = #{financialControlConfigId}, quarterly_disclosure_deadline_day = #{quarterlyDisclosureDeadlineDay}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: UPDATE t_tenant_community SET registered_voting_total_area = #{totalArea}, total_exclusive_area = #{totalArea}, registered_voting_owner_count = #{ownerCount}, registered_property_unit_count = #{unitCount}, statistics_version = statistics_version + 1, statistics_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' RETURNING statistics_version
mapper.update: UPDATE t_tenant_denominator_review_request SET status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND status = 'PENDING'
